rationale: Flask is a clean src-layout Python package with a uv.lock and a comprehensive pytest suite; rules_python's Gazelle plugin can generate py_library/py_test targets from imports, with deps resolved via pip.parse from a requirements lock.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "flask",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_python", version = "2.0.2")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_python_gazelle_plugin", version = "2.0.2")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")

python = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:python.bzl", "python")
python.toolchain(
    python_version = "3.12",
    is_default = True,
)
use_repo(python, "python_3_12")

pip = use_extension("@rules_python//python/extensions:pip.bzl", "pip")
pip.parse(
    hub_name = "pip",
    python_version = "3.12",
    requirements_lock = "//:requirements.lock",
)
use_repo(pip, "pip")
root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle")
load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//manifest:defs.bzl", "gazelle_python_manifest")
load("@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//modules_mapping:def.bzl", "modules_mapping")

# gazelle:python_root
# gazelle:python_generation_mode package
# gazelle:exclude examples
# gazelle:exclude docs

modules_mapping(
    name = "modules_map",
    wheels = all_whl_requirements,
)

gazelle_python_manifest(
    name = "gazelle_python_manifest",
    modules_mapping = ":modules_map",
    pip_repository_name = "pip",
    requirements = "//:requirements.lock",
)

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = "@rules_python_gazelle_plugin//python:gazelle_binary",
)
setup_commands: uv export --format requirements-txt --no-hashes -o requirements.lock || pip-compile -o requirements.lock pyproject.toml
anticipated_risks: test_apps fixtures with non-importable module names (flask.py shadow)
data files (templates, static, .env) needing data attrs not inferred
conftest.py fixture sharing across test dirs
